name: Ornamental roof ridge (chiwen)
description: An ornamental ridge line along the top of a roof: an @accent ridge running the longer axis with horns sweeping up at both ends — the chiwen ridge-beast ornaments of an East-Asian roof. Composes on top of a hip/gable roof crest.
placement_rules: Runs along the roof ridge (longer horizontal axis).
Horns rise at both ridge ends.
python_skill_signature: pipeline.skills.ridge_dragon.build(aabb: AABB, materials: Materials, style: str, **kwargs) -> list[Op]
style_affinity: East-Asian (Japanese/Chinese) motif. Coherent in japanese/chinese (and fantasy). Out of place in Western, Gothic, Renaissance, Modern, Mediterranean buildings — use only if the building is East-Asian.
